text: Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Healthcare, Arizona. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? I'm sorry, I couldn't quite catch it.
